summary: Public Athlete Profile V1 Feature - All tests PASSED. Backend (15/15) and Frontend UI tests verified slug-based URLs, privacy settings, completeness check, coach summary, and settings UI.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/public/profile/{slug} returns public profile with privacy filtering when published
VERIFIED: GET /api/public/profile/{slug} returns 404 when profile is unpublished
VERIFIED: GET /api/public/profile/{slug} returns 404 for non-existent slug
VERIFIED: GET /api/athlete/public-profile/settings returns settings, slug, completeness, coach_summary_preview
VERIFIED: GET /api/athlete/public-profile/settings auto-generates slug on first call
VERIFIED: PUT /api/athlete/public-profile/settings updates visibility toggles (is_published, show_contact_email, etc.)
VERIFIED: PUT /api/athlete/public-profile/settings only accepts boolean values for known keys
VERIFIED: POST /api/athlete/public-profile/generate-slug regenerates slug from current profile data
VERIFIED: Privacy filtering - contact_email hidden when show_contact_email=false
VERIFIED: Privacy filtering - bio hidden when show_bio=false
VERIFIED: Privacy filtering - unpublished profile returns 404 to public
VERIFIED: Frontend public profile page loads at /p/{slug} with coach summary section
VERIFIED: Frontend settings page shows Public Profile section with publish toggle, share link, completeness bar (83%), visibility toggles (7/7)
VERIFIED: Frontend legacy /s/{shortId} route still works as fallback (shows error for invalid shortId)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Emma Chen data with slug 'emma-chen-2026-oh'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public Profile V1 fully implemented and tested. Slug is 'emma-chen-2026-oh'. Profile is published with show_contact_email=true. Settings UI shows 83% completeness (missing Profile Photo and Highlight Video). Coach summary is deterministic: 'Emma Chen is a 5'10 Outside Hitter, Class of 2026, from Miami, FL. Currently competing with U17 Premier. Carries a 3.8 GPA.' All 7 visibility toggles work (Email, Phone, Academics, Measurables, Club Coach, Bio, Events).

frontend_public_profile.events_section: PASS - Where to See Me Play

legacy_route./s/{shortId}: PASS - fallback works, shows error for invalid
